payload.answer: Accept only one deduplicated, provisional memory card. Do not create three memories from the same repeated message, and do not over-resolve the identities of Sam or Bill Evans.
citations: "Same input delivered three times: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans."

entity_resolution.reason: Neither Sam nor Bill Evans is uniquely identified. Keep mention-level/provisional entities and avoid duplicate writes for repeated identical input.

memory_cards.statement: Sam, associated with Goldman, stated that he likes Bill Evans.

details: Processed repeated identical input as a single memory write.
Suppressed duplicate cards from the two retry deliveries.

repair_options: Use idempotent write logic so identical retries map to the same stored event/card.
Keep Sam and Bill Evans as provisional entities until they can be uniquely resolved.
If stronger provenance is required, store this as an attributed statement rather than a fully asserted enduring preference.
